name: BofA / Merrill
ai_strategy_summary: The longest-running AI program in wealth management. Erica has surpassed 3.2 billion total interactions with 20.6 million active users and 700 million interactions in 2025 alone. BofA's 30 billion total digital interactions in 2025 grew 14% YoY — 86% of wealth management clients now engage digitally.
headline_metric: 3.2B Erica interactions total (700M in 2025) across 20.6M users; 23,000 monthly active advisors
headline_initiative: AI Meeting Journey + Erica + Ask Merrill + Ask Private Bank

client_personalization.headline: Erica: 3.2 billion total interactions, 20.6 million users, 700M interactions in 2025
client_personalization.detail: Bank of America's Erica virtual assistant has reached 3.2 billion total interactions since its 2018 launch, with 20.6 million active users and 700 million interactions in 2025 alone. 86% of wealth management clients engage digitally. BofA's total digital estate logged 30 billion client interactions in 2025 — a 14% year-on-year increase.
evidence: 3.2 billion total Erica interactions since 2018 (BofA, March 2026)
30 billion total digital client interactions in 2025 (+14% YoY)
86% of wealth management clients engaging digitally
client_personalization.jpm_implication: Erica's scale is unmatched in consumer banking AI. Chase's digital AI capabilities are directly competing with Erica for the same mass affluent clients.

sources.name: Bank of America — BofA AI and Digital Innovations Fuel 30 Billion Client Interactions (March 10, 2026)

advisor_productivity.headline: AI Meeting Journey: full-scale rollout across Merrill and Private Bank, up to 4 hours saved per meeting
advisor_productivity.detail: BofA deployed AI-Powered Meeting Journey across Merrill Wealth Management and the Private Bank in March 2026. The tool automates pre-meeting client preparation, real-time meeting summarization (with client consent), and post-meeting task organization. Started with 1,500 beta advisors, now in full production rollout. This sits on top of existing Ask Merrill (23,000 monthly active advisors, 10,000+ Q&A answers) and Ask Private Bank.
evidence: AI Meeting Journey in full-scale rollout across Merrill and Private Bank (BofA Newsroom, March 2026)
Up to 4 hours saved per client meeting claimed (BofA Newsroom, March 2026)
1,500 beta users before broader deployment (American Banker, March 2026)
23,000 monthly active advisors on Ask Merrill (prior capability)
10,000+ unique Q&A answers monthly on Ask Merrill
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: BofA has moved from Q&A AI to full meeting workflow automation at wirehouse scale. This is the first production deployment of end-to-end meeting AI in the wirehouse segment.

sources.name: BofA Newsroom — Merrill and Private Bank Launch AI-Powered Meeting Journey (March 27, 2026)
American Banker — Bank of America gives Merrill Lynch an AI makeover (March 26, 2026)

client_acquisition.headline: AI-powered segment migration and next-best-action across 67M clients
client_acquisition.detail: Bank of America is applying AI to segment migration and next-best-action across its 67M client base, but the WM-specific AI acquisition tooling for Merrill advisors is not separately disclosed with the same specificity as the core consumer AI stack. The $13B 2026 technology investment signals intent; WM-specific AI acquisition capabilities are assumed to be in pilot.
evidence: $13B 2026 technology investment includes AI across all client segments
67M client base — AI-driven segment migration from consumer to Merrill Edge/Merrill Lynch in development
WM-specific AI acquisition product not separately disclosed
client_acquisition.jpm_implication: BofA's AI-driven migration from banking to wealth management is a direct competitive threat to CWM and JPMWM acquisition pipeline.

sources.name: Bank of America Q3 2025 Earnings — technology investment and AI strategy
